result:
Data cleaning complete. Output saved to data/output/cleaned_data.csv with 16111 observations and 5 variables (NSID, marstat19, marstat25, marstat32, marstat_adu). The script successfully:

1. Loaded all 5 input files from data/input/ directory
2. Merged datasets using full_join by NSID
3. Converted wave-specific missing codes to standard codes (-9, -8, -1, -3, -2, -7)
4. Created age-specific marital status variables (marstat19, marstat25, marstat32)
5. Created collapsed harmonized marital status variable (marstat_adu) for cross-age comparability
6. Applied appropriate value labels to all categorical variables
7. Output cleaned data to data/output/cleaned_data.csv
